title: A Father’s Life Is Erased
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Luffy, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Kuma, Bonney as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: CATCH him immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't manipulate my age near this old guy!! Why is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bonney, the one who gave you this skill was me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We conducted an experiment on a certain baby where we gave them the skills of a devil fruit without making them eat it directly. We administered it with an extract...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Although it was a success, it is indeed an unnecessary fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The User is able to transform however they want regarding the foreseeable future.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, its abilities are severely decreased when one's knowledge about the future differs from reality.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I want to believe in Nika...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nika" exists!! From the day that Dad became a cyborg who obeyed you without question,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I swore that I'd search for him, to give him freedom again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first glint of evidence that confirmed a reality where he was dead was enough to weaken me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your father, who believed in such worthless Balcanian legends,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: said this to me: "I want to save people, just like Nika!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was also me who experimented with drugs in your mother,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one who would later become the 8th lady of the Holy Land!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the side effects didn't stop showing up: the blue marks were still appearing; it was a failure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It didn't go very well

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So even her child inherited that condition.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: UWAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did something fall over there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It was all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: your fault.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Your experiments? Saturn!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were toying with Kuma's family by using an illness such as the sapphire scales!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This was the reason why Kuma gave away his life!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey,,, you should put yourself in my place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you saying that I should understand the feelings of an insect?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That is impossible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: UWAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What!? A PacificTA!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No!! There is a paw in the palm of his hand!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: to the southeastern shore of egghead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the former warlord of the sea, Kuma, has appeared!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is currently advancing to the center of the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The command chip is not working!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We can't stop him!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
